title: 9X2 fusial thrust engine
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''9X2''' was a fusial thrust engine system produced by [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub]].

It was installed in standard models of the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[Heavy/Light Attack Fighter 500|HLAF-500 starfighter]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-07-XX -->''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]''
*<!-- 2014-01-24 -->''[[Suns of Fortune]]''
